_comment: Swap `active` to any provider key below to change image backends. Each frame is vertical short-form: default 9:16. The agent reads the key from `api_key_env`; never hardcode secrets here.

nvidia_nim.label: NVIDIA NIM — FLUX.1-dev  [VERIFIED WORKING 2026-07-18]
nvidia_nim.CRITICAL: The `mode` field is MANDATORY. Omitting it makes the request HANG with no response (no error). Always send "mode":"base". Send the body via a file (--data @body.json) to avoid shell-quoting JSON errors.
nvidia_nim.note: flux.1-dev confirmed working with the user's key on 2026-07-18 (~10s/image, ~768x1344). schnell endpoint hung in testing — stick with dev. steps 20-50; higher = more fidelity, more time/credits.

nano_banana.label: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Nano Banana)
nano_banana.note: ~$0.04/image if billing enabled; free tier is rate-limited. Best for photoreal + tight prompt adherence and multi-frame subject consistency.

pollinations.label: Pollinations.ai (keyless fallback for testing)
pollinations.note: No key, free, rate-limited. GET the URL to receive the PNG. Use for smoke tests before spending NIM credits.

huggingface.label: Hugging Face Inference API (FLUX/SDXL)
huggingface.note: Free tier, rate-limited; returns raw image bytes.
